title: Tomb of Adventure
description: This project adds a new structure! Which you can explore alone or with friends!
body: This mod adds a new structure that appears on the plains and in birch forests. Inside you will find a lot of different loot such as Potions, Food, Weapons, Armor and Arrows. As well as enemies: Slimes, Skeletons, Zombies, Drowneds and others. There are barricades below for epic fights. The tomb is designed as a mountain, which is very easy to spot.
